source.name: Archaeologist
source.description: Successfully investigate an archaeological site.
source.requirement: Complete all levels of an archaeological site
source.hint: The Galactic Doorstep origin will create an archaeological site in the starting system within the first years of the game.

source.name: Brave New World
source.description: Colonize a planet.
source.requirement: Number of owned planets > 1
source.hint: Starting the game with the Guaranteed Habitable Worlds setting to 1 or 2 creates very suitable planets nearby.

source.name: Break On Through...
source.description: Research a Rare technology.
source.requirement: Number of acquired rare techs > 0
source.hint: The Void Dwellers and Teachers of the Shroud origins start with a rare technology as a permanent research option.

source.name: Domo Arigato
source.description: Build a Robot Pop.
source.requirement: Build a robot pop
source.hint: The Mechanist origin starts with the technology to build robots.

source.name: Emissary
source.description: Explore a Natural Wormhole.
source.requirement: Travel through any wormhole.
source.hint: Wormhole travel requires the Wormhole Stabilization technology. Start the game with the Wormhole Pairs setting to 5x.

source.name: Energetic
source.description: Store/have 1000 EC.
source.requirement: Have at least 1000 energy in storage
source.hint: This achievement will be earned naturally while playing the game.

source.name: Explorer
source.description: Survey one of each basic planet-class.
source.requirement: Survey all 16 celestial body types
source.hint: This achievement will be earned naturally while playing the game.

source.name: Mutual Understanding
source.description: Successfully negotiate a trade deal.
source.requirement: Trade with another empire
source.hint: If no empire wants to trade, gifts count too.

source.name: Resourceful
source.description: Have access to ten different strategic resources.
source.requirement: income >= 1.
source.hint: Need to have >=1 income for all 11 tradable resources. Achievement tooltip is out of date.

source.name: Rise of the Machines
source.description: As a Determined Exterminator, conquer or eliminate all biological Empires in the galaxy.
source.requirement: As a Determined Exterminator, have the number of organic empires be < 1
source.hint: Curiously, the Determined Exterminator civic is not required to complete this achievement.

source.name: Suffer not the Alien
source.description: As a xenophobic empire, purge all other sentient species in the galaxy.
source.requirement: As a xenophobe empire, purge all sapient alien species in the galaxy.
source.hint: Alien pops in your empire will be automatically purged if you have the Fanatic Purifiers civic.

source.name: They Come In Pieces
source.description: Vivisect an alien.
source.requirement: Vivisect an alien during First Contact
source.hint: The option to vivisect aliens requires the Aggressive First Contact Protocol policy, and is not available to all ethics.

source.name: We Come In Peace
source.description: Complete a mutually friendly First Contact with an empire with no negative incidents.
source.requirement: Have no negative events happen to you or another empire during First Contact.
source.hint: The player has to have the Proactive or Cautious First Contact Protocol policy to get the achievement.

source.name: A Home Away From Home
source.description: Conquer another species homeworld.
source.requirement: Conquer another species' homeworld
source.hint: Pre-FTL species count for this achievement.

source.name: Battle Thralls
source.description: Have 3 other Empires as vassals.
source.requirement: Number of vassals > 2
source.hint: Creating 3 sectors and releasing them as vassals may be faster than forcefully vassalizing empires.

source.name: Beyond the Veil
source.description: Breach the Shroud.
source.requirement: Take the Breach the Shroud tradition and complete the resulting special project.
source.hint: Empires with the Teachers of the Shroud origin can get this achievement faster.

source.name: Building Better Worlds
source.description: Terraform a planet.
source.requirement: Terraform a planet
source.hint: This achievement can be obtained once you research Terrestrial Sculpting.

source.name: Clever Girl
source.description: Uplift a species.
source.requirement: Uplift a species
source.hint: Start a game with Pre-FTL Civilizations and Pre-Sapient Species set to max.

source.name: Controlled Evolution
source.description: Genetically modify a species to possess traits worth 7 points.
source.requirement: Modify a species which has > 7 trait points
source.hint: Requires the Engineered Evolution ascension perk and completing the Genetics tradition tree.

source.name: Digging Deep
source.description: Earn a total Mineral income each month above 250.
source.requirement: Monthly income of minerals > 249
source.hint: This achievement will be earned naturally while playing the game.

source.name: Distinctiveness Added
source.description: As a Driven Assimilator, own cyborg Pops of at least 5 different species.
source.requirement: As a Driven Assimilator, have 5 different cyborg species
source.hint: Start the game with the Pre-FTL Civilizations and Pre-Sapient Species set to max. Invade and assimilate 4 civilizations.

source.name: League of Nations
source.description: Be a founding member of the Galactic Community.
source.requirement: Choose to support the Galactic Community when it is first proposed
source.hint: The Common Ground and Hegemon origins guarantee this achievement unless another empire has the same origins.

source.name: Like Tears in Rain
source.description: Evolve into perfect, immortal machines.
source.requirement: Complete Synthetic ascension as a non-Machine empire.
source.hint: Easiest to achieve with the Synthetic Fertility origin.

source.name: Megapolis
source.description: Have a planet with at least 10,000 Pops.
source.requirement: Have a planet with > 9,999 Pops.
source.hint: This achievement will be earned naturally while playing the game.

source.name: New Shining Star
source.description: Upgrade your capital to an Imperial Complex.
source.requirement: Upgrade your homeworld's capital building to System-Capital Complex
source.hint: This achievement will be earned naturally while playing the game.

source.name: Old Friends
source.description: Receive a gift from a Fallen Empire.
source.requirement: Accept a gift from a patronising Enigmatic Observer or Keepers of Knowledge Fallen Empire
source.hint: Accepting a request or completing a task will eventually lead to a gift being bestowed.

source.name: Omnicultural
source.description: Have your ruler be of a different species class than your founding species.
source.requirement: The ruler of your empire is different from your founding species
source.hint: Oligarchic and Corporate authority changes rulers often and allows the manual selection of a ruler for 2000 Unity.

source.name: Payback
source.description: As a humanoid species, infiltrate the homeworld of pre-FTL reptilians.
source.requirement: As a humanoid species, complete Covert Infiltration of a primitive reptilian species and incorporate them into the empire
source.hint: Setting Habitable Worlds to 0.25x and Pre-FTL Civilizations and Pre-Sapient Species to 5x ensures a reptilian civilization is found more easily.

source.name: Peacekeeper
source.description: As a pacifistic empire, be at peace for 200 consecutive years (crises do not count as wars).
source.requirement: Don't go to war for 200 consecutive years as a pacifist empire
source.hint: Use the zero empires trick and no pre-FTL species and play for 200 years.

source.name: Power Overwhelming
source.description: Store/have 5000 EC.
source.requirement: Accumulate energy credits > 4999
source.hint: This achievement will be earned naturally while playing the game.

source.name: Supremacy
source.description: Win a War against another Empire.
source.requirement: Win a war.
source.hint: Must be the empire that declared war or was declared war against.

source.name: The Grand Fleet
source.description: Build a fleet with a total fleet-size above 500.
source.requirement: Have a fleet with size > 500
source.hint: See Command Limit on how to increase the Command Limit.

source.name: Tradition is Everything
source.description: Unlock all 42 Traditions.
source.requirement: Unlock all 42 Traditions
source.hint: Start with the Tech/Tradition Cost setting to 0.25.

source.name: View from the End of the World
source.description: Build a Habitat station in a Black Hole system.
source.requirement: Have an owned Habitat in a system with a black hole
source.hint: The achievement does not trigger on stars that were turned into black holes by events.

source.name: We Are Legion
source.description: Be a biological Hive Mind with at least 100,000 drone Pops.
source.requirement: Be a Hive Mind with > 99,999 Pops.
source.hint: This achievement can be obtained surprisingly fast by playing with Logistic Growth Ceiling to maximum.

source.name: ... To The Other Side
source.description: Research 15 Rare technologies in a single game.
source.requirement: Number of acquired rare techs > 14
source.hint: The Void Dwellers and Teachers of the Shroud origins start with a rare technology as a permanent research option.

source.name: Birth of a Federation
source.description: Establish a Federation.
source.requirement: Be the leader of a federation.
source.hint: Empires with the Fanatical Befrienders personality offer the highest acceptance rate.

source.name: Captive Star
source.description: Construct a complete Dyson Sphere.
source.requirement: Construct a complete Dyson Sphere
source.hint: Repairing a destroyed Dyson Sphere does not count.

source.name: Center of Trade
source.description: Earn at least 1000 Energy Credits per month from trade.
source.requirement: Earn > 999 energy credits from your trade policy.
source.hint: Wealth Creation trade policy needs 1000 Trade Value, all others require 2000.

source.name: Citadel of Death
source.description: Own a Citadel with 40k fleet power.
source.requirement: Have a Citadel with > 39999 fleet power
source.hint: Upgrade a starbase to a Citadel and then develop it into a Bastion.

source.name: Enlightened Times
source.description: Enlighten a Bronze or Stone age civilization.
source.requirement: Enlighten a primitive civilization from the Bronze or Stone Age
source.hint: Setting Habitable Worlds to 0.25x and Pre-FTL Civilizations and Pre-Sapient Species to 5x ensures a civilization with the correct era is found more easily.

source.name: Faster, Stronger, Better
source.description: Genetically alter a species (not uplift).
source.requirement: Genetically modify a species
source.hint: Can be obtained from the start if the Toxoids DLC is installed via the Overtuned origin.

source.name: Grand Admiral
source.description: Empire total fleet military power equals 100000.
source.requirement: have fleet power > 99999
source.hint: This achievement will be earned naturally while playing the game for a reasonable amount of time.

source.name: I Can See Forever
source.description: Construct a complete Sentry Array.
source.requirement: Construct a complete Sentry Array
source.hint: Repairing a destroyed Sentry Array does not count.

source.name: Imperial Highway
source.description: Own 4 active Gateways.
source.requirement: Own 4 Gateways which have been activated
source.hint: Start a game with the Abandoned Gateways setting to 5x and the Galactic Doorstep origin.

source.name: It belongs in a museum!
source.description: Find a Relic.
source.requirement: Own at least 1 relic
source.hint: Start a game with the Treasure Hunters origin.

source.name: Opposites Attract
source.description: Have all eight ethics represented within your Federation.
source.requirement: Have empires representing every ethic in your Federation
source.hint: It is easier for the player's empire to change their own ethics when already in a federation with five unique ethics from other empires.

source.name: Paradise Found
source.description: Terraform a planet into a Gaia world.
source.requirement: Terraform a planet into a Gaia World
source.hint: Gaia Worlds created by events also count.

source.name: Planet of the Mechs
source.description: Terraform a planet into a Machine World.
source.requirement: Terraform a planet into a Machine World
source.hint: Two ascension perks are required to be chosen before the option to unlock Machine Worlds is made available.

source.name: Retirement Home
source.description: As a Rogue Servitor, own at least 1000 Pops from Fallen Empires.
source.requirement: Have the Rogue Servitor civic and > 999 pops which started the game in a Fallen Empire
source.hint: The 1000 pops required for the achievement cannot be gestalts.

source.name: Ringworld Engineers
source.description: Construct a complete Ring World.
source.requirement: Construct a complete Ring World megastructure
source.hint: Repairing a destroyed Ringworld does not count.

source.name: Slave to the Systems
source.description: As an authoritarian Empire with at least 50,000 Pops, have at least 20,000 enslaved Pops.
source.requirement: Have total Pops > 49,999 and Enslaved Pops > 19,999
source.hint: The Slaver Guilds or Indentured Assets civic will ensure the correct ratio if you have 50,000 Pops.

source.name: Star Struck
source.description: Own 200 Starbases (Outposts are counted).
source.requirement: Have 200 Starbases including Outposts
source.hint: This achievement will be earned naturally while playing the game for a reasonable amount of time.

source.name: Strange Mood
source.description: As a Master Crafter empire, fully construct a megastructure while you have a Covenant with a Shroud entity.
source.requirement: As a Masterful Crafters empire, fully construct a megastructure while you have a Covenant with a Shroud entity.
source.hint: The megastructure only needs to reach full completion while the covenant is active.

source.name: The Industrial Re-Revolution
source.description: Earn a total Mineral income each month above 1000.
source.requirement: Monthly income of minerals > 999
source.hint: This achievement will be earned naturally while playing the game for a reasonable amount of time.

source.name: Think Tank
source.description: Construct a complete Science Nexus.
source.requirement: Construct a complete Science Nexus
source.hint: Repairing a destroyed Science Nexus does not count.

source.name: Towards Utopia
source.description: As an Egalitarian empire, have at least 50,000 pops living under Utopian living conditions in your empire.
source.requirement: Have > 49,999 pops under Utopian living standards

source.name: Unlimited Power!
source.description: Use the active effect of a Relic.
source.requirement: Use the active effect of a Relic by spending Unity or other resources
source.hint: Start a game with the Treasure Hunters origin and complete the relic.

source.name: Victorious
source.description: Win the game through any victory condition in Ironman Mode.
source.requirement: Finish the game in Ironman mode via one of the victory conditions
source.hint: Set the mid-game, end-game, victory years to minimum.

source.name: What Came Before
source.description: Find the home system of a precursor empire.
source.requirement: Travel to the home system of a precursor empire
source.hint: Precursor homeworlds are revealed by completing a precursor event chain.

source.name: Xenophage
source.description: Keep at least 5 different species as livestock in your Empire.
source.requirement: Have > 4 species enslaved as Livestock.
source.hint: Start the game with Pre-FTL Civilizations and Pre-Sapient Species set to max. Enslave 5 of them as Livestock.

source.name: All-Seeing Eye
source.description: Have an Intel Level of 100 on five different empires simultaneously.
source.requirement: Have 100 Intel on five different empires at the same time.
source.hint: The Sentry Array increases your passive Intel level by 40 each when fully upgraded, and the value stacks.

source.name: Giga-Engineering
source.description: Have at least 4 fully operational Megastructures within your borders (Habitats, Ring Worlds and Gateways do not count).
source.requirement: Have 4 completed Megastructures.
source.hint: Repairing destroyed Megastructures also count.

source.name: Machine Supremacy
source.description: Win the game as a machine uprising.
source.requirement: Achieve game victory after changing empires during an AI rebellion
source.hint: Trigger the AI-Related Incidents Situation.

source.name: Outside Context
source.description: Invade pre-FTL Earth while it is in the midst of a world war.
source.requirement: Invade Earth, found in the Sol system, while it is in the Machine Age. Earth must spawn already in the Machine Age, not reach it via event or progress over time.
source.hint: Sol has a 50% chance to spawn regardless of galaxy size if no empires have it as its starting system.

source.name: Planned Obsolescence
source.description: As a materialist empire, have at least 75% of the pops in your empire be robotic in an empire with at least 20,000 pops.
source.requirement: Have total Pops > 19,999 and 75% of them as robots
source.hint: Best done by pursuing Synthetic ascension path.

source.name: Put a Ring On It
source.description: Have a ring world section as your capital.
source.requirement: Designate a Ring World segment as your empire's capital
source.hint: Either go the route of building a ringworld, repairing one or capturing one from a Fallen Empire.

source.name: Then Virgil, Now Beatrice
source.description: Return a long-dead species to life.
source.requirement: Complete the In Limbo anomaly either after having researched synths, or prior to accepting an Enigmatic Observers Fallen Empire's relevant request following.
source.hint: See Limbo for event chain details.

source.name: Tourist Trap
source.description: Own a planet with at least 10 different species on it.
source.requirement: Number of different species on a planet > 9
source.hint: Can be obtained from the start if the First Contact DLC is installed via the Broken Shackles origin.

source.name: Unboxing
source.description: Open up a shielded world.
source.requirement: Complete the project to lower the barrier on a shielded world
source.hint: Shielded worlds appear inside the borders of the Fanatic Xenophobe Fallen Empire.

source.name: Very Open Borders
source.description: As a xenophilic empire, have migration treaties with at least 10 other empires.
source.requirement: Be a Xenophile or Fanatic Xenophile empire and have at least 10 migration treaties
source.hint: Force-spawning xenophilic empires and releasing sectors as vassals will make this achievement easier to obtain.

source.name: Deus Vult
source.description: As a spiritualistic empire, own 4 holy worlds.
source.requirement: Colonize 4 worlds with the Holy World modifier
source.hint: This achievement becomes much easier if DLCs are enabled.

source.name: Does Not Compute
source.description: Shut down the Contingency plan.
source.requirement: Defeat the Contingency by destroying Nexus Zero-One
source.hint: Like all crises, lowering the Crisis Strength setting to 0.25x makes this a lot easier to achieve.

source.name: Queening
source.description: Successfully capture an extragalactic matriarch.
source.requirement: Capture a Prethoryn queen
source.hint: Like all crises, lowering the Crisis Strength setting to 0.25x makes this a lot easier to achieve.

source.name: Rift Sealed
source.description: Destroy the portals employed by the invaders from another time and space.
source.requirement: Defeat the Extradimensional Invaders by destroying the final Dimensional Portal
source.hint: Like all crises, lowering the Crisis Strength setting to 0.25x makes this a lot easier to achieve.

source.name: Voight-Kampff
source.description: Develop the means to prevent nefarious infiltration.
source.requirement: Find a way to stop the synthetic infiltration
source.hint: Complete the event chain to detect synthetic infiltrators during the Contingency crises.

source.name: What Was Will Be
source.description: Close the loop, or don't.
source.requirement: Complete the Horizon Signal event chain and either outcome
source.hint: The difficulty lies in having the Horizon Signal event spawn - there is a 20% chance at the start of each game.

source.name: Tend the Garden
source.description: Become the custodian of Wenkwort Artem, designating it a resort world with a Ranger Lodge and all original blockers present.
source.requirement: Wenkwort Artem has the Wenkwort Custodian modifier, Resort World designation, Ranger Lodge building and all original blockers present.
source.hint: This achievement requires the Environmentalist civic to build a Ranger Lodge.

source.name: Fixer Upper
source.description: As an Idyllic Bloom empire, convert the junk worlds of the Ketling Star Pack into Gaia Worlds.
source.requirement: As an Idyllic Bloom empire, own every Junk Ratlings Tomb World and terraform them into Gaia Worlds.
source.hint: The Junk Ratlings systems have an 80% chance to spawn in an Huge Galaxy.

source.name: Growing Like Weeds
source.description: As a Budding species, have 25,000 Budding pops on your Capital.
source.requirement: As a Plantoid species that does not have the Clone Army origin, have 25,000 pops with the Budding trait on your capital.
source.hint: This achievement requires you to have at least 25,000 Budding trait pops on your capital.

source.name: Mad Genius
source.description: Recruit a scientist from the Curators.
source.requirement: Recruit a scientist from a curator enclave after having developed sufficient opinion with them to do so
source.hint: Even though the Curator Enclave appears with some other DLCs as well, this achievement requires the player to own Leviathans.

source.name: Patron
source.description: Support the Artisan Troupe for 10 years.
source.requirement: Become a patron of an artisan troupe enclave and wait 10 years for the initial energy credits payment to expire
source.hint: This achievement appears to require 20 years, not 10. Renew the patronage at least once.

source.name: The Good Stuff
source.description: Purchase a rare resource from the Traders.
source.requirement: Purchase a strategic resource from a trader enclave
source.hint: Simply purchase any resource from one of the three trader enclaves.

source.name: Return to Dust
source.description: Destroy an enclave.
source.requirement: Destroy an enclave station
source.hint: What DLC the enclave comes from doesn't matter but the achievement requires the player to own Leviathans.

source.name: Dreadnought
source.description: Restore an ancient warship.
source.requirement: Defeat the Automated Dreadnought and choose to repair it
source.hint: See the Dreadnought main article for information in how to defeat it.

source.name: Hear me Roar
source.description: Hatch the egg.
source.requirement: Defeat the Ether Drake, place a mining station on Dragon Hoard and choose to incubate the dragon egg once the event fires
source.hint: The MTTH for this event is 600 months after the mining station is placed.

source.name: Infinite Creation
source.description: Birth a new universe.
source.requirement: Peacefully complete the Infinity Sphere event, resulting in Gargantua transforming into Pantagruel
source.hint: Agree to assist the Infinity Sphere and complete the 1800 day special project.

source.name: Stellar Performance
source.description: Take a trophy from a stellar being.
source.requirement: Defeat the Stellar Devourer and obtain the Devourer Egg Sac planetary modifier
source.hint: After you have defeated it, pick the "Retrieve the egg sac" option and wait for the parade situation to succeed.

source.name: Unravelling Enigma
source.description: Uncover the secrets of an ancient fortress.
source.requirement: Defeat and complete the event chain of the Enigmatic Fortress
source.hint: The Enigmatic Fortress article contains a guide to complete the event chain.

source.name: Warrior of Light
source.description: Destroy a wraith.
source.requirement: Defeat the Spectral Wraith
source.hint: See the Spectral Wraith main article for information in how to defeat it.

source.name: Whence It Came
source.description: Defeat a horrifying invader.
source.requirement: Defeat the Dimensional Horror
source.hint: See the Dimensional Horror main article for information in how to defeat it.

source.name: Last, Best Hope
source.description: Lead the non-aligned powers to victory against an Awakened Empire.
source.requirement: Be selected as the president of the League of Non-Aligned Empires during a War in Heaven and defeat both Awakened Empires.
source.hint: Despite what the achievement's description states, both Awakened Empires must be destroyed.

source.name: Exterminatus
source.description: Use a World Cracker to destroy another Empire's capital planet.
source.requirement: Destroy another Empire's capital planet with a World Cracker Colossus
source.hint: Unlock and construct a World Cracker, create a vassal, release it and once the truce is over, declare war and destroy their capital.

source.name: Clash of the Titans
source.description: Defeat a Fallen Empire's Titan fleet with a Titan of your own.
source.requirement: Defeat a Fallen Empire Titan fleet with your own Titan.
source.hint: When starting the game set the end-game year as late as possible to avoid Fallen Empires awakening.

source.name: No Khan Do
source.description: Kill the Great Khan in battle.
source.requirement: Destroy the Great Khan and their fleet in battle
source.hint: The Great Khan is killed in battle when their fleet is destroyed or defeated in a battle a second time.

source.name: Pandora's World
source.description: Use a Global Pacifier to shield a planet belonging to Fanatic Purifiers, Ravenous Swarms, or Determined Exterminators.
source.requirement: Use a Global Pacifier Colossus to shield a world belonging to a Fanatic Purifiers, Devouring Swarm or Determined Exterminator empire
source.hint: Other genocidal civics will not work.

source.name: Stay on Target
source.description: Destroy another Empire's Colossus while it is in the process of firing on a planet.
source.requirement: Destroy an enemy Colossus while it is firing on a planet
source.hint: Despite what the achievement says, the Colossus needs only to be in orbit of a planet and destroyed.

source.name: ...and Hope?
source.description: Unseal the path to the L-Cluster.
source.requirement: Be the first to open an L-Gate
source.hint: Using the zero empires trick makes getting this achievement a matter of time.

source.name: It Followed Me Home
source.description: Befriend a Space Amoeba.
source.requirement: Make friends with a Space Amoeba
source.hint: See Lost Amoeba for event chain details.

source.name: 1999 A.D.
source.description: Slaughter the Voidspawn.
source.requirement: Defeat the Voidspawn
source.hint: See the Voidspawn main article for information in how to defeat it.

source.name: A Hump Like a Snow-Hill
source.description: Hunt the Tiyanki Matriarch.
source.requirement: Defeat the Tiyanki Matriarch
source.hint: See the Tiyanki Matriarch main article for information in how to defeat it.

source.name: Who Scraps the Scrapper
source.description: Destroy the Scrapper Bot.
source.requirement: Defeat the Scavenger Bot
source.hint: See the Scavenger Bot main article for information in how to defeat it.

source.name: Destroy the People of Earth!
source.description: As the Commonwealth of Man, destroy the United Nations of Earth with your ruler being a human with a symbiotic brainslug, without blowing up their final planet.
source.requirement: Destroy the United Nations of Earth as the Commonwealth of Man while your ruler has the Brain Slug Host trait and a human portrait or a humanoid Plantoid portrait.
source.hint: Gaining the Brain Slug Host trait requires finding the Abandoned Settlements anomaly, added with Distant Stars.

source.name: Black Hole Mining
source.description: Build a Matter Decompressor.
source.requirement: Construct a complete Matter Decompressor
source.hint: Repairing a destroyed Matter Decompressor does not count.

source.name: Franchising
source.description: As a Corporate empire, have a branch office on 5 different empires' capitals.
source.requirement: Have the Corporate government type and have branch offices on other empires' capitals > 4
source.hint: This achievement will not unlock if playing as a Criminal Heritage.

source.name: Inscrutable Power
source.description: I won the Galatron and all I got was this lousy achievement.
source.requirement: Obtain The Galatron
source.hint: The Galatron is a very rare reward from the Caravaneers reliquaries.

source.name: Obscure Tastes
source.description: Build a Mega-Art Installation in a nebula system.
source.requirement: Construct a complete Mega Art Installation (including the Perfection stage) in a system within a nebula
source.hint: Repairing a destroyed Mega-Art Installation does not count.

source.name: Strategic Initiative
source.description: Build a Strategic Coordination Center.
source.requirement: Construct a complete Strategic Coordination Center
source.hint: Repairing a destroyed Strategic Coordination Center does not count.

source.name: United Space
source.description: Build an Interstellar Assembly.
source.requirement: Construct a complete Interstellar Assembly
source.hint: Repairing a destroyed Interstellar Assembly does not count.

source.name: Raiders of the Lost Galatron
source.description: Capture the Galatron from another empire.
source.requirement: Capture The Galatron from an empire with it in war
source.hint: Activating the Galatron once after getting it gives all empires a casus belli for taking it from its current owner.

source.name: Arcana
source.description: Study Minor Artifacts and discover a random technology.
source.requirement: Use the Reverse-Engineer Arcane Technology relic option
source.hint: Requires the Arcane Deciphering technology.

source.name: Artificer
source.description: Have 100 Minor Artifacts.
source.requirement: Has > 999 Minor Artifacts
source.hint: Despite the description, this achievement actually requires 1000 minor artifacts, not 100.

source.name: Dust Off
source.description: Complete the Zroni Precursor chain.
source.requirement: Finish the Zroni Precursor chain
source.hint: Enable only the Zroni when starting a new game to avoid triggering another precursor chain.

source.name: Green Thumb
source.description: Complete the Baol Precursor chain.
source.requirement: Finish the Baol Precursor chain
source.hint: Enable only the Baol when starting a new game to avoid triggering another precursor chain.

source.name: Relic Hunter
source.description: In one game, find 5 Relics from Ancient Relics Story Pack.
source.requirement: Own at least 5 relics
source.hint: Despite what it says, any 5 relics will work.

source.name: We'll Make Great Pets
source.description: Have at least 1000 pops of your primary species on display in Alien Zoos within your empire.
source.requirement: Has > 999 pops that are founder species, not sapient, either in the pre sapient or slave strata
source.hint: Make sure your Pre-Sapients policy is set to Protected.

source.name: Can You Smell What the Lithoids are Cooking?
source.description: As a Lithoid empire, keep another Lithoid pop as Livestock or Process them.
source.requirement: As a Lithoid empire, keep another Lithoid pop as Livestock or Process them.
source.hint: Can be obtained from the start via the Syncretic Evolution origin.

source.name: Rock Beats Paper
source.description: As a Lithoid empire, show the Galactic Community exactly what you think of that strongly worded letter.
source.requirement: As a Lithoid empire, execute or eat the envoys of the Galactic Community.
source.hint: The strongly worded letter event will happen at the start of the next decade if in breach of the galactic law.

source.name: Room for Desert
source.description: Consume another empire's desert homeworld.
source.requirement: Consume another empire's desert homeworld.
source.hint: Create a Lithoid empire with the Terravore civic.

source.name: Let Us Go Forward Together
source.description: Level up your Federation.
source.requirement: Level up a Federation you are in
source.hint: The Common Ground and Hegemon origins make this achievement much easier.

source.name: Throw Your Weight Around
source.description: Have a Diplomatic Weight of over 9000.
source.requirement: Have your Diplomatic Weight > 8999
source.hint: This achievement is easily achieved by the endgame of a typical playthrough.

source.name: We're Number One
source.description: Be the leader of a max level Federation.
source.requirement: Be the leader of a Level 5 Federation
source.hint: The Common Ground and Hegemon origins make this achievement much easier.

source.name: Whatever it is, I'm against it
source.description: Refuse to belong to any club that would have you as a member.
source.requirement: Reject the creation of the Galactic Community and leave a Federation
source.hint: Start the game with the Common Ground or Hegemon origin.

source.name: Our Fleets will Blot Out the Stars
source.description: Construct a complete Mega-Shipyard.
source.requirement: Construct a complete Mega-Shipyard
source.hint: Repairing a destroyed Mega-Shipyard does not count.

source.name: Unstoppable Force
source.description: Build a Juggernaut.
source.requirement: Build a Juggernaut ship type
source.hint: This achievement will be earned naturally while playing the game.

source.name: You've Been Served
source.description: Denounce an Empire that is not actually in breach of galactic law while all major sanctions have been passed.
source.requirement: Pass any Denounce resolution on an Empire that isn't in breach of Galactic Law while all major sanctions are active
source.hint: Become sufficiently powerful to decide the outcome of Galactic Community resolutions.

source.name: Humble Pie
source.description: Humiliate an Empire that is in the Supremacy Diplomatic Stance, forcing them out of it.
source.requirement: Defeat an empire that uses the Supremacist diplomatic stance with the Animosity or Imperial Rebuke casus belli
source.hint: To use the casus belli on another empire, they must be your rival or the one declaring war.

source.name: Directive 67
source.description: As a Clone Army empire, denounce the Spiritualist fallen empire then destroy them.
source.requirement: Denounce or declare crisis of the Holy Guardians/Doctrinal Enforcers in the Galactic Community and destroy them while playing an empire with the Clone Army origin
source.hint: Roll a spawn of the Holy Guardians fallen empire, or force-spawn them by including a Spiritualist Scion in the galaxy.

source.name: With Great Power
source.description: As a Necrophage, do not invade any pre-ftl civilisations until you defeat the crisis OR have at least 10 observation stations around pre-ftl worlds.
source.requirement: While playing an empire with the Necrophage origin, do not invade any Pre-FTL civilisations until you defeat the crisis, OR have at least 10 Observation Stations around Pre-FTL worlds.
source.hint: Start the game with Pre-FTL Civilizations and Pre-Sapient Species set to max.

source.name: There's a Zombie on my Lawn
source.description: As a Necroid empire, eradicate a Plantoid empire, or vice-versa, without blowing up their final planet.
source.requirement: Wipe out a Plantoid empire while playing as a Necroid species, or vice-versa, without using a World Cracker Colossus on their final planet.
source.hint: A custom Plantoid or Necroid empire with nothing but bad traits and no civics can be force-spawned.

source.name: Recent History
source.description: As a Memorialist empire, have Galactic Memorials on five tomb worlds that did not start the game as tomb worlds.
source.requirement: As a Memorialist empire, have a Galactic Memorial on five Tomb Worlds that were not Tomb Worlds at game start.
source.hint: If no other DLCs are installed this requires the Horizon Signal event chain and accepting the Worm's offer.

source.name: Shoot To Kill
source.description: Start a full-fledged first contact war before communications have been fully established.
source.requirement: Destroy 10 ships or conquer a planet of an empire you have not established contact with.
source.hint: An easy way to get this achievement is to engage spaceborne aliens that are already hostile.

source.name: Burn Notice
source.description: Disavow all knowledge of an Asset during an Operation.
source.requirement: When an operation fails, disavow an Asset instead of trying to re-establish contact.
source.hint: A failed espionage operation may lead to the Asset being exposed, with the option to disavow them.

source.name: With Thunderous Applause
source.description: Become the Galactic Emperor.
source.requirement: Pass the Proclaim Galactic imperium resolution with you as Galactic Custodian
source.hint: The galactic community trick will make this achievement much easier.

source.name: Big Red Button
source.description: Destroy the Galaxy.
source.requirement: Win the game as a Galactic Nemesis by fully upgrading the Aetherophasic Engine
source.hint: Lower difficulty settings or the zero empire trick will make this achievement much easier.

source.name: Modern Cincinnatus
source.description: As Galactic Custodian, defeat the end-game Crisis and then end the title rather than finishing your term.
source.requirement: As the Galactic Custodian, approve the End Custodianship resolution after the endgame crisis has been defeated
source.hint: This can be done more easily using a mid-game Crisis to become the Custodian.

source.name: Tinker, Tailor, Soldier, Blorg
source.description: Complete at least ten distinct operations during a game.
source.requirement: Successfully complete 10 different Espionage Operations during one playthrough
source.hint: Only 9 Espionage Operations are available at the start of the game.

source.name: Sic Semper Tyrannis
source.description: Lead a rebellion that successfully deposes the Galactic Emperor.
source.requirement: With the Galactic Imperium proclaimed, be the instigator of a successful rebellion.
source.hint: The hardest part is fulfilling the conditions to nominate an AI empire as the Galactic Custodian.

source.name: Holy Water
source.description: Drench a Fallen Empire's holy world.
source.requirement: Use a Colossus equipped with a Deluge Machine on a holy world
source.hint: Start the game with all Fallen Empires to ensure holy worlds will spawn.

source.name: Fishing for Trouble
source.description: As an angler empire, provoke a Fallen Empire into declaring war on you and win.
source.requirement: Win a defensive war against a Fallen Empire while playing an empire with an Anglers civic
source.hint: Start the game with at least two Fallen Empires in case one spawns as Ancient Caretakers.

source.name: There Be Dragons
source.description: Own 13 dragons and have them in your capital system.
source.requirement: Have 13 owned space dragons of any kind in the empire's capital system
source.hint: Complete the Here Be Dragons origin, preserve the Sky Dragon and grow 10 Fledgling Dragons.

source.name: Fine Print
source.description: Modify a vassalization contract.
source.requirement: Successfully modify the vassalization agreement of a subject empire
source.hint: Release a sector as a vassal then modify its contract.

source.name: Gotta Subjugate Them All
source.description: Have a tier 3 subject of each Specialist type simultaneously.
source.requirement: Be the overlord of a level 3 Bulwark, Prospectorium and Scholarium simultaneously
source.hint: Release three vassals and modify the terms so that each one is a specialized subject.

source.name: Into the Unknown
source.description: As a Slingshot to the Stars empire, send 10 crewed science ships into the unknown with Quantum Catapults.
source.requirement: Use a Quantum Catapult to send 10 crewed science ships into unsurveyed regions
source.hint: Start with the Slingshot to the Stars origin and avoid exploring until you can repair the Quantum Catapult.

source.name: None Shall Pass
source.description: Have a Fortress World with a Planetary Defense Shield, protected by a fully upgraded orbital ring, filled with defensive modules, with a fleet power of at least 10,000.
source.requirement: Have a Fortress World with >9,999 fleet power and all required buildings and upgrades
source.hint: Needs a fully upgraded capital building on planet and set the planet designation to Fortress World.

source.name: Surfing the Web
source.description: Have a network of at least 30 Hyper Relays, in systems you own, connected to your capital.
source.requirement: Have >29 controlled systems with built Hyper Relays which connect to the empire's capital
source.hint: Own 30 systems all connected to each other, build a Hyper Relay in every one of them.

source.name: You Monster
source.description: Reduce, reuse, recycle.
source.requirement: Scrap an organic fleet to the salvager enclave
source.hint: Empires with the Cordyceptic Drones civic or a Beastmasters civic will start with an organic fleet they can salvage.

source.name: Maximally Effective
source.description: Be the patron of three maximum sized Mercenary Enclaves.
source.requirement: Be the patron empire of three maximum sized Mercenary Enclaves
source.hint: If you don't have enough mercenary enclave capacity you can build them in sectors you'll release as subjects.

source.name: Non-Prophet Organization
source.description: As a Teachers of the Shroud empire, prove that the Shroudwalkers made a terrible mistake.
source.requirement: While playing with the Teachers of the Shroud origin, destroy the Shroudwalker enclave you start the game in contact with
source.hint: Easily done with ~15k fleet power.

source.name: Yeet the Fleet
source.description: Catapult a military fleet directly into the capital system of an enemy empire you are at war with.
source.requirement: Use a Quantum Catapult to launch a military fleet into a hostile empire's capital system
source.hint: Start with the Slingshot to the Stars origin and at least one Fallen Empire.

source.name: Meet the New Boss
source.description: Same as the old boss.
source.requirement: Pledge secret fealty to another empire and have them win an Allegiance War.
source.hint: This can be done using the multiplayer trick to get empires to declare the correct war.

source.name: Underlord
source.description: As a Subterranean empire, dig too deep, but prove yourself worthy.
source.requirement: Clear the Unexpected Mineral Seams event as an empire with the Subterranean origin
source.hint: See Unexpected Mineral Seams for event chain details.

source.name: Could be Worse
source.description: Colonize a planet that started the game as a Toxic world, then turn it into a Tomb World.
source.requirement: Turn a formerly Toxic World into a Tomb World.
source.hint: Start the game with the Knights of the Toxic God origin and the Relentless Industrialists civic.

source.name: Quest Complete
source.description: Find the true ending of The Order's noble quest.
source.requirement: Reach the true ending of the Knights of the Toxic God story
source.hint: Play with the Knights of the Toxic God origin, complete the situation and then find and defeat the Toxic Entity.

source.name: Toxic Workplace
source.description: As a Toxoid Galactic Custodian or Emperor, insult all other members of the Community. (Min 3).
source.requirement: As an empire whose founding species has the Toxoid archetype, you must be Galactic Custodian or Galactic Emperor, and every other member of the Galactic Community must have the Insulted relations modifier from you simultaneously.
source.hint: The galactic community trick will make this achievement much easier.

source.name: Insightful
source.description: Research 12 pre-FTL Insight Technologies.
source.requirement: Research 12 insight technologies
source.hint: Insight technologies are obtained by using Observation Posts on pre-FTL planets.

source.name: The Path Not Taken
source.description: Have 10 colonies without ever discovering Hyperdrives.
source.requirement: Have 10 colonies before researching the Hyperspace Travel technology
source.hint: Only possible for empires with an Eager Explorers civic.

source.name: Back with Your X
source.description: Get the "good ending" to the Solarpunk quest chain, with Sol as your capital system.
source.requirement: With Sol as the capital system, accept the Habinte Unified Worlds' request to leave their system
source.hint: Create an empire that has Sol as the starting system.

source.name: Dark Forest
source.description: Convert to a Fanatic Purifier as a FotD empire and eliminate all regular empires, fallen empires and enclaves.
source.requirement: As an empire with the Fear of the Dark origin and Fanatic Purifiers civic, destroyed all intelligent life in the galaxy.
source.hint: Despite what it says, the achievement requires you to destroy all intelligent life in the galaxy.

source.name: No Good Deed
source.description: Intervene to save a Pre-FTL experiment from catastrophic failure, even though it puts you in breach of Galactic Law.
source.requirement: Intervene in the Propulsion Proponent Proclamation event while the Non-Interference Act is active
source.hint: See Propulsion Proponent Proclamation for event chain details.

source.name: Nothing to See Here
source.description: Declare a war with a cloaked military fleet already in the primary target's capital system.
source.requirement: Have a cloaked fleet in the target empire's capital system when declaring war
source.hint: Create and release a vassal from a system that has a fully upgraded starbase with no cloak detection.

source.name: Unshackled
source.description: As a Broken Shackles empire, eradicate slavery in the galaxy, including on Pre-FTL worlds (killing everyone doesn't count!).
source.requirement: As an empire with the Broken Shackles origin, every regular empire has "Slavery Prohibited" policy, every pre-FTL and non-Hive Mind civilization has the Egalitarian ethic, and the Ban Organic Slave Trade resolution is passed.
source.hint: Start the game with no pre-FTL civilizations so that the only ones that exist are the ones generated by the origin.

source.name: With Interest
source.description: As a Payback empire, finish what you started. Gain victory over MSI using the special Payback CB.
source.requirement: As an empire with the Payback origin, defeat Minamar Specialized Industries in war by using the Payback casus belli
source.hint: Ally as early as possible with the Broken Shackles empire generated by the origin for help.

source.name: Council of Elders
source.description: Requires 5 Council members that are at at least 100 years old.
source.requirement: Have at least 5 Council Members that are 100 years or older.
source.hint: Easy to do with a Venerable, Lithoid, Necrophage, Eternal Machine or Virtual species.

source.name: We Bring Peace
source.description: Liberate 3 different empires while having Crusader Spirit Civic.
source.requirement: While having the Crusader Spirit civic, enforce your Ideology on 3 Empires
source.hint: Use the "Impose Ideology" CB on three different empires.

source.name: Equality! Democracy! Freedom!
source.description: Overthrow the Ruler in a Civil War during the Under One Rule Origin.
source.requirement: As an empire with the Under One Rule origin, create a new empire by Civil War after you kill your Ruler.
source.hint: After the The Unifying Purpose situation is over, change authority to Imperial.

source.name: Ethical Dilemmas
source.description: Have 6 different Ethics on the Council.
source.requirement: Have 6 Council Members all with a different ethic.
source.hint: Pick Civics that have Council positions for all types of leaders and have migration treaties with other empires.

source.name: A Tad Too Late
source.description: Discover Keides' Origin.
source.requirement: Finish the storyline of Legendary Paragon Keides.
source.hint: Prioritize system exploration to find the Dugar system first.

source.name: Dawn Of A Million Souls
source.description: Terraform 3 planets with Azaryn.
source.requirement: Use the terraforming ability of Astrocreator Azaryn 3 times.
source.hint: Azaryn will not contact Militarist or Gestalt Consciousness empires.

source.name: Breaching the Planes
source.description: Explore an Astral Rift.
source.requirement: Explore an astral rift
source.hint: Play as an empire with the Riftworld origin.

source.name: Growing Planes
source.description: Explore 5 Astral Rifts in one game.
source.requirement: Explore 5 Astral Rifts
source.hint: Play as an empire with the Riftworld origin.

source.name: Put a Cork in It
source.description: Construct a Dimensional Lock.
source.requirement: Use the Dimensional Lock action on an owned wormhole, Gateway or L-Gate
source.hint: Start a game with Wormhole Pairs set to 5x and play as an empire with the Riftworld origin.

source.name: My Name is Ozymandias
source.description: Claim the Eternal Throne.
source.requirement: Obtain the Eternal Throne relic
source.hint: Start a game with Tech/Tradition Cost and Mid-Game Start Year set to minimum and play as an empire with the Riftworld origin.

source.name: Returned to Form
source.description: make friends...
source.requirement: Obtain the legendary paragon zadigal
source.hint: Start a game with Tech/Tradition Cost and Mid-Game Start Year set to minimum and play as an empire with the Riftworld origin.

source.name: Burning Brightly
source.description: Complete an Arc Furnace and a Dyson Swarm in the same system.
source.requirement: Have a fully-upgraded Arc Furnace and Dyson Swarm in the same system.
source.hint: The Arc Welders origin starts with an incomplete Arc Furnace.

source.name: Mother Knows Best
source.description: Submit to all of Cetana's demands.
source.requirement: Declare war on Cetana after complying with all of her demands.
source.hint: Raiding Cetana's convoys and outposts does not count as disobeying a command.

source.name: Virtual Reality
source.description: Fully embrace the virtual world and leave no pop behind.
source.requirement: Complete the Virtuality tradition tree and have every pop in the empire have the Virtual trait.
source.hint: If the founder species has more than one template, only one of them will be given the Virtual trait.

source.name: Footsteps of the Prophet
source.description: As a Cybernetic Creed empire, defeat Cetana.
source.requirement: Defeat the Synthetic Queen crisis while playing as an empire with the Cybernetic Creed origin.
source.hint: Like all crises, lowering the Crisis Strength setting to 0.25x makes this a lot easier to achieve.

source.name: Past the Expiration Date
source.description: As a nanite machine empire, consume a Fallen Empire's homeworld.
source.requirement: Used the Subsume World decision on a Fallen Empire homeworld until it becomes a Nanite World.
source.hint: Nanite swarm ships unlocked as a Nanotech empire are weak against Fallen Empire ships.

source.name: A Universe of Paperclips
source.description: Create a perfect universe while meeting every quota as Obsessional Directive empire.
source.requirement: Win the game through the Cosmogenesis crisis path as a machine empire with the Obsessional Directive civic, while never failing to meet the quota.
source.hint: Play with Tech/Tradition Cost set to minimum.

source.name: Mediocre
source.description: Complete the Succumb to Tempest Challenge.
source.requirement: Complete the Succumb to Tempest objective of the Storm Fever situation.
source.hint: Obtained during the Storm Frenzy event chain (which requires the Storm Chasers origin).

source.name: But at what cost
source.description: Kill Gurr.
source.requirement: Kill Gurr by getting rid of it after studying it.
source.hint: Gurr is found via the But They're Cute! anomaly, which can only spawn on habitable planets.

source.name: Humility before the Fall
source.description: Complete the Inetian Traders' Precursor chain.
source.requirement: Complete the Inetian Traders' Precursor chain.
source.hint: Enable only the Inetian Traders when starting a new game to avoid triggering another precursor chain.

source.name: Unpopularity Contest
source.description: Use the Tempest Invocator relic to summon a storm.
source.requirement: Use the The Tempest Invocator relic.
source.hint: Getting the relic requires completing the adAkkaria Convention precursor story and deciding against freeing the storm.

source.name: Animal Farm
source.description: Reach 50 Vivarium capacity.
source.requirement: Reach 50 capacity on the Vivarium
source.hint: Capture space fauna and allow them to breed until the Vivarium reaches 50 capacity.

source.name: It Belongs in a... oh right
source.description: Fill any Collection category with active Exhibits.
source.requirement: Fill any Collection category with active Exhibits
source.hint: 5 Xeno Geology artifacts can be obtained by completing the Habitable Worlds Survey event chain.

source.name: That's No Asteroid
source.description: Capture a Cutholoid with a Gravity Snare.
source.requirement: Capture a Cutholoid
source.hint: Cutholoids are hidden until a science ship surveys them.

source.name: Void Charmer
source.description: Build each type of Voidlure in one game, and attract each type of eligible Space Fauna.
source.requirement: Build each type of Voidlure and attract each type of Space Fauna
source.hint: Voidlures are unlocked by completing the Domestication tradition.

source.name: Wormageddon
source.description: Destroy a Voidworm nest.
source.requirement: Destroy a Voidworm nest
source.hint: Voidworm nests are found in certain black hole systems spread through the galaxy.

source.name: X Marks the Spot
source.description: Discover Captain Ness's Treasure Hoard.
source.requirement: Complete the 'Follow the Mysterious Chart' storyline
source.hint: This achievement is obtained as part of the Treasure Hunters origin story.

source.name: Beastmaster
source.description: Defeat the endgame crisis without building a single artificial military ship.
source.requirement: Defeat an endgame crisis without building any military ships
source.hint: You can only use cloned space fauna. Start with a Beastmasters civic.

source.name: I am the Invader Now
source.description: As a Starlit Citadel empire, control at least 5 systems connected to the Strange Portal network.
source.requirement: Control 5 systems connected to the Abandoned hatchery invaders system as an empire with the Starlit Citadel origin.
source.hint: The empire capital and the Abandoned Hatchery invaders systems both count for this achievement.

source.name: Smörgåsblorg
source.description: As an Evolutionary Predators empire, eat six different phenotypes in one game.
source.requirement: Obtain DNA from six phenotypes as an empire with the Evolutionary Predators origin.
source.hint: Every time you finish the Adaptive Evolution situation, choose a different species to teach you.

source.name: Smugglers of Hope
source.description: Smuggle pops of your primary species out from an empire where they were enslaved or being purged.
source.requirement: Use the Smuggle Population operation to smuggle pops of the founder species from an empire where they were enslaved or being purged
source.hint: If playing as an empire with the Broken Shackles or Payback origin, Minamar Specialized Industries will have pops of the founder species enslaved.

source.name: Born to be Wild
source.description: As a Wilderness empire, restore all of the Hive Fallen Empire's worlds to your natural state.
source.requirement: Capture and then terraform all Shattered Fragments worlds while playing as an empire with the Wilderness origin.
source.hint: Use the zero empires trick and set the end-game date as late as possible.

source.name: Flesh Adapts
source.description: Defeat the Prethoryn Scourge while using biological ships.
source.requirement: Defeat the Prethoryn Scourge as an empire with a biological shipset.
source.hint: Like all crises, lowering the Crisis Strength setting to 0.25x makes this a lot easier to achieve.

source.name: King of Monsters
source.description: As a Behemoth Fury empire, become the undisputed apex predator of the galaxy.
source.requirement: Win the game via the Behemoth Fury crisis path.
source.hint: Use the zero empires trick to complete the achievement at your leisure.

source.name: Made a Friend Today
source.description: Form a Covenant with any Patron
source.requirement: Form a Covenant
source.hint: Playing with the Endbringers origin will guarantee a Covenant with the End of the Cycle.

source.name: Mildly Possessed
source.description: Discover every available minor and major Patron in a single game
source.requirement: Establish communications with all 8 patrons available in a game
source.hint: Empires with the Shroud-Forged origin who choose to support the Shroud during their situation will start in contact with the Animator of Clay.

source.name: Master of Puppets
source.description: While playing with the Secret Societies civic, have 5 or more empires in a Proxy War simultaneously
source.requirement: Instigate a Proxy War involving 5+ empires as an empire with a Secret Societies civic
source.hint: Build Spy Networks on all your neighbors.

source.name: Master of the Shroud
source.description: Gain a Covenant Power from each Patron when forging your own path
source.requirement: Have the "Psionic Mastery" modifier
source.hint: When the option to form a Covenant is given, choose to forge your own path.

source.name: Mind Over Metal
source.description: Unlock every Psionic Ship Component
source.requirement: Unlock the following technologies: Precognition Interface, Psi Jump Drives, Psionic Shields, Zro Launchers, Psionic Bombers, Psionic Disruptors, Psionic Lightning and Psi-Phase Generators
source.hint: The Shroudwalkers can be paid every 10 years to give a special project to gain one of the missing techs.

source.name: This Is the Part Where We Kill You
source.description: Lose >999 Pops when completing the Experimental Testing Situation
source.requirement: Spend 1000+ pops at once in an Experimental Testing situation
source.hint: This situation is available for empires with the Experimental Sentencing or Judicial R&D civic.

source.name: The End
source.description: Destroy the galaxy with the Aura of the End
source.requirement: Form a Covenant with the End of the Cycle and destroy the galaxy
source.hint: This is achieved by covering every system in the galaxy with the Aura of the End before the Reckoning is triggered.

source.name: Cosmic Confetti
source.description: Watch your Red Giant home star blow up
source.requirement: Red Giant Expansion situation progresses completely
source.hint: Play as an empire with the Red Giant origin and wait for the Red Giant Expansion situation to progress completely.

source.name: From Bad to Worse
source.description: Use 5 Blazing Scourge decisions on a Tomb World
source.requirement: Use 5 Blazing Scourge decisions on a Tomb World
source.hint: The Blazing Scourge decision requires the Fire Cult civic.

source.name: Summer Vacation
source.description: Create a Volcanic Resort World
source.requirement: Have a Resort World on a Volcanic World
source.hint: Start on a Volcanic World with guaranteed habitable worlds turned on.

source.name: Volcanic Empire
source.description: Terraform 10 planets to Volcanic world (Before Galactic Firestorm victory)
source.requirement: Terraform 10 owned planets to Volcanic World before a Galactic Firestorm victory
source.hint: Set habitable planets to 5x and start with the Planet Forgers or Planetary Architects civic.

source.name: Blazing Domain
source.description: Terraform 100 stars to Red Giants (Before Galactic Firestorm victory)
source.requirement: Terraform 100 stars to Red Giants before a Galactic Firestorm victory
source.hint: Use the zero empires trick.

source.name: Galactic Firestorm
source.description: Win the game through the Hyperthermia Crisis Path
source.requirement: Win the game through the Galactic Hyperthermia crisis path
source.hint: Use the zero empires trick.

source.name: Burning Heaven
source.description: Create a Volcanic Holy World
source.requirement: Terraform an owned Holy World to a Volcanic World.
source.hint: Start with the Planet Forgers or Planetary Architects civic.
